name: umuturanyi
description: Umuturanyi — a neighborhood marketplace & community platform for Rwanda.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @umuturanyi/shared && npm run build -w @umuturanyi/api
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,mobile -c green,magenta "npm run dev -w @umuturanyi/api" "npm run start -w @umuturanyi/mobile"
